title: albizia calcarea
intro: Albizia calcarea, also known as White Siris or Kalijira, is a deciduous tree native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Albizia calcarea are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
